events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`: the back-graded section fails IPC 704.1 (which requires continuous uniform slope — 1/4"/ft for ≤2.5", 1/8"/ft for ≥3" — toward the point of disposal). Puddle test confirming standing water shows the pipe isn't draining by gravity as required. Decision: `fail`, medium risk, correctable now since it's still rough-complete and not closed in — re-grade the run, fix supports, and re-test before sign-off.
